dive.d: Diving on the first turn, the user floats up and attacks on the next turn. It can be used to dive deep in the ocean.

sharpen.d: The user lowers its polygon count to make itself more jagged, raising the Attack stat.

icepunch.d: The target is punched with an icy fist. This may also leave the target frozen.

howl.d: The user howls loudly to raise its spirit, which raises its Attack stat.

jumpkick.d: The user jumps up high, then strikes with a kick. If the kick misses, the user hurts itself.

blurb: POKÉMON RISING RUBY / SINKING SAPPHIRE Attack Changes Modifications to Pokémon Move Values This document covers any changes made to any attacks. Only modified attacks are listed here, with modifications to power, type, accuracy, PP, or effects written out if applicable.

The changes here mostly focus on making HM moves usable, as well as boosting the base power of some moves that feel too weak early or buffing the effectiveness of some moves obtainable by only a few Pokémon.
Moves are listed in alphabetical order.
